bounded_scope: Extend the protected-record access audit matrix to /api/mentor/meetings without direct Figma work.
changes: /api/mentor/meetings GET now supports scoped readback for student self, active assigned mentors, scoped program teachers, and admins.
/api/mentor/meetings GET denies misc-admin broad access, student-other reads, inactive mentor assignments, and empty-scope program teachers for targeted readback.
The route now audits read access as mentor_meetings_unauthorized, mentor_meetings_denied, and mentor_meetings_viewed with redacted actor role scopes for authenticated attempts.
The POST path now audits missing sessions as mentor_meeting_unauthorized and non-mentor role denials as mentor_meeting_denied.
Mentor assignment denials and held-meeting success audits now include actorRoleScopes.
tests/mentor-meetings.integration.test.mjs covers the protected-record matrix and mutation audit paths.
tests/production-workflow-source.test.mjs locks the mentor meeting audit markers.
